full_text:
Xue Yong (Maochang)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xue Yong, styledMaochang, was born in Shanyang. Followed Liu Bei into Yi. Xue Yong was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
